title: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
author: Detection Engineering Team
description: Detects PowerShell execution containing encoded commands, execution policy bypass flags, or download cradles. These patterns are heavily abused by malware, ransomware, and post-exploitation frameworks.
false_positive_notes: Legitimate administrative scripts using encoded commands for special characters. Software installers temporarily bypassing execution policy. Document all approved encoded scripts and suppress by script hash.
severity_rationale: HIGH because PowerShell abuse is the most common post-exploitation technique. Encoded commands almost always indicate intent to evade detection.
